sources.title: Max Fleischer's Gabby - The Complete Collection (1940-41)
sources.description: A collection of 8 shorts featuring Gabby from the 1939 animated feature film, "Gulliver's Travels". All 8 of these shorts produced by Max Fleischer for Paramount Pictures and directed by Dave Fleischer

metadata.Plot: The story follows the childhood and teen years of Gabby Douglas, the first black gymnast in Olympic history to become the Individual All-Around Champion and the first American gymnast to win gold in both the individual all-around and team competitions at the same Olympics.
metadata.Actors: Regina King, Imani Hakim, Sydney Mikayla
